subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1911-10-20 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: The sun shines upon the earth, giving light and warmth to all creatures. The Sun of Truth also shines
subcodes.subjects: @corruption and renewal; abandoning religious dogmas, @material and spiritual existence; two books, @Manifestation of God as sun, @present and future calamities; war; universal convulsion
